name: Crowdstrike Falcon Containment
creator: 9378d367-2470-4d0f-acb4-2303f9927e59
description: This block performs containment on endpoints by targeting case-related IPs and hostnames to prevent further compromise. A boolean input controls manual or automatic execution. In automatic mode, the Upload IOCs and Isolate Endpoint flags determine which actions run. It returns true if successful, false on failure, or empty if no action is taken.

steps.name: Condition
steps.description: This condition determines the progress of the playbook. Conditions are built based on cases data (cases, alerts, vents, entities and environment properties) as-well as data that comes back from previous playbook steps.

steps.name: Condition
steps.description: This condition determines the progress of the playbook. Conditions are built based on cases data (cases, alerts, vents, entities and environment properties) as-well as data that comes back from previous playbook steps.

steps.name: CrowdStrikeFalcon_Upload IOCs
steps.description: Add custom IOCs in Crowdstrike Falcon. Supported entities: Hostname, URL, IP address and Hash. Note: Hostname entities are treated as domain IOCs and action will extract domain part out of URLs. Only MD5 and SHA-256 hashes are supported.

steps.name: CrowdStrikeFalcon_Contain Endpoint
steps.description: Contain endpoint in Crowdstrike Falcon. Supported entities: Hostname and IP address.

steps.name: Entity Selection
steps.description: Creates a group of entities that can be used in other actions. Use conditions to fine tune the group.

steps.name: CrowdStrikeFalcon_Contain Endpoint
steps.description: Contain endpoint in Crowdstrike Falcon. Supported entities: Hostname and IP address.

parameters.name: MessageToAssignee
parameters.value: Do You want to contain the endpoint?
